title: coristospermum ferulaceum
intro: Coristospermum ferulaceum, also known as the False Ferula, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Coristospermum ferulaceum include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
